_metadata.purpose: Provides packaged default Sentinel AI configuration values for Stage 9 learning-readiness build.
change_history: 0.1.0: Added packaged defaults for Sprint 1 foundation.
0.2.0: Added MT5 connection defaults.
0.3.0: Added market data feed defaults and application version update.
0.4.0: Added live chart rendering resource defaults and application version update.
0.5.0: Added live market refresh defaults and application version update.
0.5.1: Changed supported timeframe refresh defaults to one second for tighter MT5 synchronization.
0.6.0: Added symbol management defaults for broker/account-specific symbol resolution and selection.
0.7.0: Added market structure engine defaults and application version update.
0.8.0: Added support/resistance engine defaults and application version update.
0.9.0: Added BOS visibility and liquidity engine defaults with application version update.
0.9.1: Changed support/resistance and liquidity overlays to candle-bounded segments and reduced default visual noise.
0.9.2: Added imbalance defaults for fair value gap and order block boxed overlays and enabled BOS/COC labeling support.
0.9.3.1: Added active-only overlay defaults and fallback S/R range box behavior using latest swing boundaries.
0.9.3.2: Added chart right-side future scrolling defaults and flicker-reduced rendering behavior.
0.9.3.3: Added consolidation-only S/R range behavior and unchanged-overlay flicker suppression.
0.9.3.4: Added close-based S/R box invalidation and forced compact dashboard reasons.
0.9.3.5: Added true consolidation S/R filtering and double-buffer flicker reduction defaults.
0.9.3.6: Added rendered active-range status accuracy and render debounce flicker reduction.
0.9.3.7: Added physical-pixel canvas buffer swap to prevent partial redraw artifacts.
0.9.3.8: Removed buffer-copy rendering and restored single-canvas repaint path to prevent rectangular repaint artifacts.
1.0.0: Added Momentum Engine defaults for EMA, MACD, stochastic, and candle momentum context.
1.1.0: Added Confidence Engine defaults for context-only scoring across structure, S/R, liquidity, imbalance, and momentum.
1.1.1: Preserved Confidence Engine defaults while fixing live refresh display wiring.
1.2.0: Added Entry Validation Engine defaults for BUY_SETUP / SELL_SETUP / WAIT setup validation.
1.2.1: Refined Entry Validation setup alignment and WAIT reason behavior.
1.2.2: Added pullback-aware Entry Validation behavior using existing setup settings.
1.2.3: Added neutral-momentum Entry Validation allowance inside valid setup zones.
1.3.0: Added Risk Reward Engine defaults for TP, SL, and minimum risk/reward validation.
1.3.1: Added smart TP target selection behavior without changing risk defaults.
1.3.2: Added rejected-plan display labeling and stricter directional TP guard behavior.
1.3.3: Added extended TP target discovery from range extremes, imbalance far edges, and ATR projection.
1.4.0: Added chart trade-plan overlay and manual review gate behavior without order execution.
1.4.1: Preserved trade plan overlay settings while adding polished manual review modal and reviewed-plan snapshot logging.
1.5.0: Added user-confirmed manual MT5 market order placement settings.
1.5.1: Added adaptive order filling fallback for brokers that reject AUTO/IOC/FOK/RETURN filling mode.
1.6.0: Added position monitoring and daily trade statistics integration.
1.6.1: Added active-trade chart lock and position-priority display behavior.
1.6.1.1: Fixed startup AttributeError by initializing active-position lock before first risk/reward update.
1.6.1.2: Fixed active-position chart compression when broker position TP or SL is missing/zero.
1.6.2: Added active-position missing SL/TP warning display without automatic repair.
1.7.0: Added closed-trade lifecycle result tracking and last-result dashboard fields.
1.7.1: Added timeframe-based candle countdown timer and active-trade header priority display.
1.7.1.1: Fixed candle countdown timer stuck at full timeframe by using wall-clock timeframe alignment and repainting every second.
1.7.1.2: Anchored countdown to latest broker candle open and prevented false reset before a new candle arrives.
1.7.1.3: Fixed countdown stuck at full duration by normalizing candle timestamp units and using live candle-cycle modulo countdown.
1.7.2: Removed unreliable candle countdown timer and added MT5 history matching fallback plus close type detection.
1.7.3: Restricted win/loss statistics to trades created from Sentinel AI and suppressed outside MT5 history.
1.7.4: Added persistent Sentinel-owned trade journal and magic/comment recovery for app-created trades not previously reflected in dashboard.
1.7.5: Added persistent Sentinel trade ledger, multi-ticket app statistics, and active Sentinel trade recovery.
1.8.0: Added closed-trade outcome persistence to the Sentinel trade ledger and dashboard ledger performance totals.
1.8.1: Added open/closed Sentinel ledger counters and result status dashboard labeling.
1.8.2: Added active-ticket close guard and strict MT5 deal-entry filtering.
1.8.3: Added pending close settlement state and dashboard counter.
1.8.4: Added lifecycle stage, tracked Sentinel ticket, and pending close age dashboard diagnostics.
1.8.4.1: Fixed lifecycle result-status helper binding on startup.
1.9.0: Added robust close-history resolver, close resolver status, and audit warning diagnostics.
1.9.0.1: Fixed robust close resolver method binding inside MetaTrader5Service.
1.9.0.2: Fixed close resolver and audit helper method binding inside SentinelApplication.
2.0.0: Added current trade priority, stale pending backlog, ledger health, and stage completion dashboard fields.
2.0.1: Separated current pending-close trades from stale pending backlog records.
2.1.0: Added ledger maintenance tools for archive stale pending, export ledger, and guarded reset.
2.2.0: Added lenient close settlement resolver and moved pending diagnostics out of main dashboard.
2.3.0: Added pending history repair tool and final manual-mode completion status.
2.4.0: Added guarded auto-trade execution engine, default OFF, confirmation-gated, one-trade-at-a-time.
2.5.0: Locked Auto Trade by default and added prediction persistence stabilization.
2.6.0: Added Auto Trade diagnostics build version while keeping Auto Trade locked by default.
2.7.0: Added Stage 8 Trade Manager service completion build version while keeping Auto Trade locked by default.
2.8.0: Added learning-readiness review defaults while keeping automatic parameter adjustment disabled.
